atDirectives.name: @tailwind
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS directive to inject base, components, or utilities styles.

atDirectives.name: @apply
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS directive to apply utility classes inside custom CSS.

atDirectives.name: @layer
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS directive to register custom styles in a layer.

atDirectives.name: @config
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS directive to specify which config file to use.
